item.title: Alibaba, Tencent Join $2 Billion Funding for Kuaishou’s Kling AI
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. joined a $2 billion financing round for Kuaishou Technology’s Kling AI, valuing the creator of one of China’s most popular generative video services at about $15 billion before the investment. Alibaba joined a clutch of investors in Kling that included Baidu Inc. and Tencent Holdings Ltd. — a previous backer of Kuaishou.
